name: Basic Brightfield
description: Entry-level setup: 10× achromat, single LED, Abbe condenser, basic CMOS camera.

name: Phase Contrast
description: Phase contrast 20× with aspheric phase-ring condenser and HIK MV-CS060.

name: GFP + SiR High-Resolution Fluorescence
